passwordReset.title: Password Reset Request
passwordReset.intro: You requested to reset your password. Click the link below to create a new password:
passwordReset.expiry_note: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
passwordReset.security_note: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.footer_reason: You received this email because a password reset was requested for your account.

emailVerification.title: Email Verification
emailVerification.intro: Please verify your email address by clicking the link below:
emailVerification.expiry_note: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
emailVerification.security_note: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
emailVerification.footer_reason: You received this email because an email verification was requested for your account.
